S.FORM: Manute Bol sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Manute Bol, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2010) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: manute Œ≤ol s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj **, manute Œ≤ol, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
